data.content: Implementation complete at commit 52001ba4. Added grouped bundled workflow dispatch targets shared by Settings and setup, threaded workflow/profile-aware pool resolution into runtime step-agent selection, and introduced Add to all bulk seeding plus legacy fallback compatibility. Added coverage for dispatch target derivation, workflow-target pool resolution, setup writer persistence, grouped setup interaction, and settings grouping wiring. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
